scripts.build:all: pnpm run build:typings && pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:backend && pnpm run build:webcomponent && pnpm run build:testapp
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n typings,backend,frontend,rest-api-docs -c green,cyan,magenta,yellow "./scripts/dev/watch-typings.sh" "node ./scripts/dev/watch-with-typings-guard.mjs 'pnpm run dev:backend'" "node ./scripts/dev/watch-with-typings-guard.mjs 'pnpm run dev:frontend'" "pnpm run dev:rest-api-docs"
scripts.clean: pnpm -r exec rm -rf dist node_modules && rm -rf node_modules
